title: Search the SpiderIQ Component Marketplace
summary: Search the curated SpiderIQ component marketplace by kind / mood / palette / brand_fit_tags / scene_type, then insert a result into a page. Use whenever the user asks for 'a hero section', 'a CTA block', 'a pricing component', 'a testimonials block', 'a footer with X', 'a section that does Y', or any 'find me a section / block / component for ...' request. Walks through the marketplace_search call, narrowing by 4-class taxonomy, the LLM-suggested agent_meta workflow for fresh assets, and the insert-into-page flow with dry_run/confirm gating.
